elder_thorne.name: Elder Thorne
notes: Keeps watch over the catacomb gate.

captain_mirel.name: Captain Mirel
notes: Commands scouts along the eastern ridge road.

moonfall_town.name: Moonfall Town
moonfall_town.description: A fortified hill-town huddled around a chapel and market square.

moonfall_catacombs.name: Moonfall Catacombs
moonfall_catacombs.description: A damp crypt where broken sigils glow in the dark and bones stir.

brindlewatch_outpost.name: Brindlewatch Outpost
brindlewatch_outpost.description: A wind-battered watch post guarding the old ridge road and supply route.

q_catacomb_blight.title: Silence Beneath Moonfall
q_catacomb_blight.description: Take Elder Thorne's task and clear the Bone Warden from the catacombs.
objectives: Speak with Elder Thorne in Moonfall Town
Defeat the Bone Warden or calm the shrine

q_supply_line.title: The Broken Supply Line
q_supply_line.description: Captain Mirel needs a missing crate recovered from Brindlewatch.
objectives: Find and secure the sealed crate
